meta.description: Thai and Chinese cuisine at Nyír Pláza, Nyíregyháza. Wok-fired noodles, curries, and family-style plates.

home.ctaSub: Walk-ins welcome. For groups, call ahead.

about.title: About us
about.introBody: Bangkok Thai Chinese Restaurant brings together two beloved Asian kitchens: the aromatic curries and salads of Thailand, and the wok-hei and comfort dishes of China. We cook to order, balancing spice, sweetness, and savoriness in every plate.
about.fusionBody: You will find Thai staples like Pad Thai and green curry alongside Chinese classics such as Kung Pao chicken and wonton soup—each plate tuned for clarity of flavor and generous portions.
about.serviceBody: Fast, friendly service with a focus on consistency. We source fresh produce daily and keep our menu approachable for families, students, and mall visitors alike.
about.spaceBody: Warm lighting, dark wood tones, and red-gold accents create a calm, modern space—perfect for a quick lunch or a relaxed dinner after shopping.
